_help: Registry of guilds on the Boards. A guild registers via the 'Guild registration' issue (or a PR on this file). Fields: members (declared roster size), avgLevel (average member level), totalXp (cumulative member XP), created (guild creation date) — all optional except id/name/tag; null renders as '—' on the site.

guilds.name: La Clauderie
guilds.motto: On quête, on raid, on rigole — ensemble.
